# Vestream

> Vestream is a free token vesting tracker and alert service that monitors every unlock event across 11 protocols and 7 chains. Users paste any EVM or Solana wallet address to instantly see all active vesting positions, upcoming cliff dates, claimable balances, and unlock schedules — with push notifications before each event. The Pro tier adds the web dashboard, email alerts, and tax-ready CSV exports for Koinly, CoinTracker, and TurboTax. A REST API and MCP server (npm: @vestream/mcp) make vesting data queryable by AI agents and developers.

## Key Pages

- [Token Vesting Tracker — Homepage](https://www.vestream.io/): Portfolio-focused landing page; free wallet scan CTA
- [Find Vestings](https://www.vestream.io/find-vestings): Free wallet scanner — paste any EVM or Solana address to see all vesting positions across all supported protocols
- [Token Unlock Calendar](https://www.vestream.io/unlocks): Live calendar of upcoming unlock events (today / this week / this month / 30/60/90-day windows)
- [All Protocols](https://www.vestream.io/protocols): Supported vesting protocols with live TVL, stream counts, and next unlock
- [Pricing](https://www.vestream.io/pricing): Free tier and Pro plan ($9.99/month or $74.99/year)
- [Developer API](https://www.vestream.io/developer): REST API and MCP server for AI agents and developers
- [Resources](https://www.vestream.io/resources): In-depth guides on token vesting, tokenomics, and unlock tracking
- [Vestream Invest](https://www.vestream.io/invest): Investor-focused landing page
- [iOS App](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/vestream-token-unlocks/id6769799911): Vestream on the App Store

## Protocol Pages

- [Sablier unlock tracker](https://www.vestream.io/protocols/sablier): Sablier linear + tranched vesting — ETH, BNB, Polygon, Base, Arbitrum
- [Hedgey unlock tracker](https://www.vestream.io/protocols/hedgey): Hedgey NFT-based vesting plans — ETH, BNB, Polygon, Base, Arbitrum
- [UNCX unlock tracker](https://www.vestream.io/protocols/uncx): UNCX TokenVesting V3 and VestingManager — ETH, BNB, Polygon, Base
- [Superfluid unlock tracker](https://www.vestream.io/protocols/superfluid): Superfluid cliff + streaming vesting scheduler
- [PinkSale unlock tracker](https://www.vestream.io/protocols/pinksale): PinkLock V2 TGE + cycle-based schedules
- [Unvest unlock tracker](https://www.vestream.io/protocols/unvest): Unvest step/milestone vesting
- [Streamflow unlock tracker](https://www.vestream.io/protocols/streamflow): Streamflow Solana vesting
- [Jupiter Lock tracker](https://www.vestream.io/protocols/jupiter-lock): Jupiter Lock — Solana token locker
- [LlamaPay tracker](https://www.vestream.io/protocols/llamapay): LlamaPay streaming payroll
- [Team Finance unlock tracker](https://www.vestream.io/protocols/team-finance): Team Finance team/treasury token vesting with on-chain lock proof — merkle-distributed, hard to track anywhere else — ETH, BNB, Polygon
- [Sablier Flow tracker](https://www.vestream.io/protocols/sablier-flow): Sablier Flow open-ended token streaming for payroll and grants

## Data Coverage

Protocols: Sablier, Hedgey, UNCX (TokenVesting V3 + VestingManager), Superfluid, PinkSale (PinkLock V2), Unvest, Streamflow, Jupiter Lock, LlamaPay, Team Finance, Sablier Flow
Chains: Ethereum (1), BNB Chain (56), Polygon (137), Base (8453), Arbitrum One (42161), Optimism (10), Solana (101)
Update cadence: streams indexed daily; unlock calendar refreshes every 15 minutes; TVL snapshots daily at 03:15 UTC

## API and MCP

- OpenAPI spec: https://www.vestream.io/openapi.json
- MCP package: `npx -y @vestream/mcp` (works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, any MCP-compatible agent)
- API key: request at https://www.vestream.io/developer
- MCP tools: get_wallet_vestings, get_upcoming_unlocks, get_stream

## Resources (Articles)

### Fundamentals

- [What Is Token Vesting? A Complete Guide](https://www.vestream.io/resources/what-is-token-vesting): How vesting works, why it exists, terminology, on-chain enforcement
- [Token Vesting Schedules Explained: Cliff, Linear, and Stepped](https://www.vestream.io/resources/token-vesting-schedules-explained): Deep dive on schedule types with worked examples
- [The Vesting Cliff Explained](https://www.vestream.io/resources/vesting-cliff-explained): What cliffs are, why 12 months became standard, how they move markets
- [Cliff Vesting vs Linear Vesting](https://www.vestream.io/resources/cliff-vesting-vs-linear-vesting): Side-by-side comparison of the two dominant structures
- [How to Read a Vesting Schedule](https://www.vestream.io/resources/how-to-read-a-vesting-schedule): Step-by-step guide to interpreting any vesting schedule document
- [What Is a Token?](https://www.vestream.io/resources/what-is-a-token): Plain-English primer for people new to crypto

### Guides

- [How to Track Your Token Vesting](https://www.vestream.io/resources/how-to-track-token-vesting): Every method from manual block explorer lookups to multi-protocol dashboards
- [How to Track Your Sablier Stream Unlocks](https://www.vestream.io/resources/how-to-track-sablier-unlocks): Find your Sablier vesting streams and get alerted before each unlock — manual vs automated compared
- [How to Track Your Hedgey Vesting Unlocks](https://www.vestream.io/resources/how-to-track-hedgey-unlocks): Find your Hedgey NFT vesting plans and their unlock dates without checking each plan by hand
- [How to Track Team Finance Token Unlocks](https://www.vestream.io/resources/how-to-track-team-finance-unlocks): See your Team Finance vesting unlocks despite merkle distribution making them hard to find elsewhere
- [Token Unlock Calendar: How to Track When Your Tokens Become Available](https://www.vestream.io/resources/token-unlock-calendar): Building and reading an unlock calendar
- [Token Vesting Tax Guide](https://www.vestream.io/resources/token-vesting-tax-guide): How vested tokens are taxed in the US, UK, and EU; when the taxable event occurs
- [Crypto Payroll and Contributor Income Guide](https://www.vestream.io/resources/crypto-payroll-and-contributor-income-guide): Income recognition, tax treatment, and planning for crypto-paid contributors

### Tokenomics

- [Shadow Liquidity: How Vesting Schedules Quietly Control Token Price Floors](https://www.vestream.io/resources/shadow-liquidity-vesting-token-price): The hidden sell pressure in every vesting schedule
- [Zombie Supply: The Hidden Impact of Unclaimed Vesting Tokens](https://www.vestream.io/resources/zombie-supply-unclaimed-vesting-tokens): Why unclaimed tokens distort circulating supply and governance
- [Micro-Cadences: How Unlock Frequency Shapes Investor Psychology](https://www.vestream.io/resources/vesting-unlock-frequency-investor-psychology): Monthly vs continuous vs annual cadences
- [How to Estimate the Price Impact of a Token Unlock Event](https://www.vestream.io/resources/estimating-token-unlock-price-impact): Float change formula, liquidity depth analysis
- [The Anatomy of Great Vesting vs. Terrible Vesting](https://www.vestream.io/resources/great-vesting-vs-terrible-vesting): Uniswap vs dYdX case studies
- [Token Allocation: What Each Stakeholder's Vesting Terms Tell You](https://www.vestream.io/resources/token-allocation-vesting-red-flags): Red flags in VC, team, and advisor allocations
- [How a Project's Vesting Schedule Reveals Its True Health](https://www.vestream.io/resources/token-vesting-health-signal): Using vesting as a due-diligence signal

### Market Analysis

- [Sablier vs Hedgey vs UNCX: Which Vesting Protocol Should You Use?](https://www.vestream.io/resources/sablier-vs-hedgey-vs-uncx-comparison): Protocol-by-protocol comparison for project teams

### Research

- [Sablier Token Streaming and Vesting Explained](https://www.vestream.io/resources/sablier-token-streaming-vesting-explained): How Sablier's Lockup and Flow products work
- [Hedgey NFT Vesting Plans Explained](https://www.vestream.io/resources/hedgey-nft-vesting-plans-explained): Hedgey's ERC-721 vesting plan mechanics
- [UNCX Token Lockers and Vesting](https://www.vestream.io/resources/uncx-token-lockers-and-vesting): UNCX V3 TokenVesting and VestingManager contracts
- [Streamflow Solana Vesting](https://www.vestream.io/resources/streamflow-solana-vesting): Streamflow's Solana vesting program
- [Superfluid Cliff and Streaming Vesting Explained](https://www.vestream.io/resources/superfluid-cliff-and-streaming-vesting): Superfluid's vesting scheduler contract
